title: Trump: 'I made Netanyahu stop' — Israel was preparing 'significant attack in Tehran' when Trump called; 'Bibi, you better be careful, or you will be on your own very soon'; blockade remains until Final Deal
snippet: Trump claimed credit for halting Israeli strikes: 'I made Netanyahu stop.' According to reports, Israel was preparing a 'significant attack in Tehran' when Trump called. Trump warned Netanyahu directly: 'Bibi, you better be careful, or you will be on your own very soon' — the most explicit threat yet of withdrawing US support from Israel. Trump called for attacks to 'immediately stop.' He stated that final peace negotiations are moving forward and the blockade remains until 'Final Deal.' Covered by MS NOW liveblog, Times of Israel liveblog, CNBC, Axios.
tag_reason: Trump's 'I made Netanyahu stop' claim and 'on your own' threat are new statements representing the sharpest US-Israel rift of the war; distinct from the June 8 'I call the shots' (src-1636) — this is an escalation in tone and specificity
